footer.tagline: Providing expert medical care for your family, anytime and anywhere. Your health is our priority.
footer.copyright: Samui Home Clinic. All rights reserved.

common.walkInInfo: Walk in to any of our 3 Koh Samui locations — no appointment needed for most services.

hero.subtext: Access expert medical care for your family, anytime and anywhere. No need to wait 2+ hours for medical support.

about.heading: Put Your Health in Safe Hands
about.body: Welcome to Samui Home Clinic, your trusted healthcare partner on the island. We combine international medical standards with the warmth of personalised care — whether you need a routine check-up, urgent treatment, or a home visit.
about.modalStory1: Samui Home Clinic was founded with a single mission: to provide world-class healthcare to the international community living on and visiting Koh Samui. Our team of English-speaking doctors, nurses, and pharmacists are here to make quality medical care accessible — wherever you are on the island.
about.modalStory2: From our state-of-the-art clinic facilities to our award-winning home visit service, we are committed to patient comfort, clinical excellence, and transparent pricing. No surprises. Just great care.
about.modalWhy1Desc: Every member of our clinical staff communicates fluently in English.
about.modalWhy2Desc: Book online or walk in — we prioritise your time.
about.modalWhy3Desc: We work with most international travel and health insurance providers.
about.modalWhy4Desc: Can't come to us? Our doctors come to you — hotel, villa, or home.
about.modalBranch1Desc: Our flagship clinic in the heart of Chaweng — fully equipped for consultations, diagnostics, and minor procedures.
about.modalBranch2Desc: Conveniently located near Bangrak Pier, serving the northern part of the island.
about.modalBranch3Desc: On-campus clinic serving students, staff, and the surrounding community.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subtext: We've streamlined our entire healthcare process so you can focus on feeling better — not navigating a complex system.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your service and book online in under 2 minutes, or simply walk in to any of our 3 locations.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Meet with one of our qualified, English-speaking doctors in person, at your hotel, or online.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive your diagnosis, prescription, or treatment plan — all clearly explained in plain language.

insurance.heading: We Accept Your Insurance
insurance.description: Samui Home Clinic accepts most international and travel insurance providers. Our team will handle the paperwork so you can focus on your recovery. Not insured? Our transparent self-pay rates are among the most competitive on the island.

testimonials.heading: What People Are Saying
testimonials.subtext: Trusted by over 2,000 patients from around the world.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes — we work with most international travel and health insurance providers. Our reception team will verify your coverage before your appointment. If you are unsure, contact us on WhatsApp and we will check for you.
faq.a2: After booking, you will receive a secure video link via email or WhatsApp. Our doctor will consult with you over video on a PDPA-compliant platform. Prescriptions and referrals can be issued digitally.
faq.q3: Can I get a prescription from a virtual visit?
faq.a3: Yes. Our doctors can issue digital prescriptions for most conditions during a virtual consultation. Controlled substances and certain medications may require an in-person visit.
faq.q4: What if I need to cancel my appointment?
faq.a4: Please cancel at least 2 hours before your appointment via WhatsApp or our booking system. Late cancellations may incur a small administrative fee. Emergency cancellations are always accommodated.

blog.noResults: No articles found for this category.
blog.ctaTitle: Need medical care on Koh Samui?
blog.ctaSubtitle: Walk in or book online 24/7. English-speaking doctors, 3 clinic locations, same-day appointments.

pharmacy.sectionSubtitle: Discover affordable healthcare essentials, connect instantly with our clinical team via online consultation, and browse a comprehensive range of premium, high-quality medical products designed for your wellbeing.
pharmacy.emptyCartHint: Add items from the pharmacy catalogue
pharmacy.rxWarning: Your cart contains prescription (Rx) items. You'll be asked to upload a valid prescription during checkout.
pharmacy.checkoutSubtitle: Complete your details below. Our pharmacist will review your order and send a payment link to your WhatsApp — no upfront credit card details required.
pharmacy.deliveryPlaceholder: Hotel name / room, villa address, or street address on Koh Samui
pharmacy.uploadPrescriptionFormats: JPG, PNG or PDF — max 10 MB
pharmacy.pdpaPharmacyConsent: I consent to Samui Home Clinic processing my personal data (name, contact, delivery address, and prescription information) for the purpose of fulfilling this medical order, in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
pharmacy.securityNote: No payment details collected here. A payment link will be sent to your WhatsApp after pharmacist approval.
pharmacy.successMessage: Your fulfillment request is now under pharmacist review. You'll be contacted on WhatsApp once your order is approved and a payment link is ready.
pharmacy.step1Desc: Our team reviews your request within 2 hours.
pharmacy.step2Desc: You receive a PromptPay payment link via WhatsApp.
pharmacy.step3Desc: Order is packed and dispatched to your address on Koh Samui, Koh Phangan or Koh Tao.
